title: 'Immer #0564
definition:
Immer = "he hath said"

 1) a priest in David's time
 2) a priest in Jeremiah's time
 3) the father of Zadok  the priest
 4) an ancestor of a priest
nasbUsage:
Definition: Immer = "he hath said"

 1) a priest in David's time
 2) a priest in Jeremiah's time
 3) the father of Zadok  the priest
 4) an ancestor of a priest

    NASB:  the name of several Isr., perh. also a place in Bab.
